chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: Now, after seeing vectorization and broadcasting, we have understood that these concepts are used when we are performing mathematical operations on arrays as a whole

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: with scalars or with other vectors, we are performing operations on them, then we use them

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: But actually, what is their work in the context of machine learning or AI?

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: So, we will take a small example of this

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: Basically, one of the most popular use cases of broadcasting is normalization

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: Normalization is a mathematical thing, a step of mathematics that is used in many algorithms

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: And to normalize, we use broadcasting

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: What exactly does normalization mean?

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: Normalization means that whenever we have many values, for example, I have values

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: In fact, let's take an example of 2D array

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: For example, we have values 1, 2, 3 and 4

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: We want to scale all these values in a particular range

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: We want to convert all these values from 0 to 1 in such a way that the relative difference between them, the relative relation remains maintained

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: So, normalization means that when we have some particular values which we want to scale in a desired range

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: 0 to 1 is a very common use case

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: So, we use normalization there

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: Normalization is implemented to increase the performance of our machine learning algorithms

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: And there are many different types of normalization

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: Normalization is performed by applying different formulas in different ways

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: One of the most practical and well-known use cases of normalization or a type of normalization is standard normalization

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: Standard normalization is a formula

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: We can also call it Z-score normalization

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: So, what is the formula of standard normalization?

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: Basically, in standard normalization, we first minus the mean of each value of our array

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: Mean is a particular value which we can calculate for any data set

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: We must have read in Maths as a child, mean, median, mode

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: So, mean, median, mode are standard values which we can calculate for any data set

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: We will discuss mean, median, mode in the next video

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: But the basic meaning is that whenever we sum all the values and divide the sum by the total number of values

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: We get the mean value of the entire data set

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: We minus the mean value from the array and divide it by the standard deviation

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: Standard deviation is also a particular value which we can calculate

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: So, how is standard deviation calculated for any data set?

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: We minus the mean value from each value

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: We minus the mean value from each value

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: And then we basically take the square of these values

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: We take the sum of all these values and divide it by the total number of values

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: And then we calculate the under root value of the answer which we get

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: So, this is basically a formula for calculating the standard deviation

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: We will discuss this in detail later

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: But this is a generic formula which we can read

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: It is also mentioned in the notes

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: But this is the basic process of calculating standard deviation for a data set

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: So, to summarize, when we perform this operation

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: Then our vector gets normalized

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: And then we can use the normalized vector in our algorithm

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: We can see a practical example of this

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: Let's come here

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: Let's remove this

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: Let's run this

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: Let's look at how do we normalize

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: To normalize, let's take an example of an array

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: It will be a 2D array

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: It is a very simple array which we discussed

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: It has only 4 elements

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: 3 and 4

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: And in this way, we will get our array

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: Now, first of all, we can calculate the mean of this array

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: To calculate the mean of the array, we actually have the formula

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: Which is np.mean

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: This is our function which we have

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: In which we will pass our array

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: So, we will get the total mean value which is 2.5

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: Now, we will see how these values are calculated

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: We will write it on a paper pen

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: And see how these values are calculated

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: Based on the formulas we have discussed

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: But this is the value

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: In the same way, we can print the standard deviation

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: Standard deviation function is std

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: So, standard deviation comes to us

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: Which is equal to 1.11

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: So, if we want to normalize the array

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: For that, we will make a normalized array

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: In fact, we will make a new array

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: Normalized array is going to be

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: This array minus the mean

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: We will store the mean value somewhere

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: This is the mean value that we have

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: Plus this is the standard deviation value

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: That we have

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: Array minus mean divided by our standard deviation

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: And after that, we are going to print the normalized array

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: So, we have got the whole array in a normalized form

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: So, standard normalization or z-score normalization

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: Works in such a way that

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: The transformed array

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: The transformed array

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: Its mean will turn out to be value 0

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: And its standard deviation value

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: Will be as close to 1 as possible

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: So, standard deviation value will be 1

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: So, if we calculate this form in our mind

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: Then we know that this value will cancel out from this value

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: This value will cancel out from this value

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: And eventually, if we calculate the mean of this array

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: That will be equal to 0

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: So, in this way, we can normalize our array

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: Let's also look at the mean and standard deviation value calculation

chunks.title: Vector
chunks.text: In fact, let's print the mean and standard deviation value
